caption: A sequence of frames shows a white background with a centralized logo and a graphic lower-third overlay. The logo consists of the text "TFNN.COM" in a bold, black font, with the phrase "EDUCATING INVESTORS" positioned directly underneath it in a smaller, uppercase black font. Across the bottom of the screen, a dark blue and black horizontal banner contains white text. The top line of this banner reads "Basil Chapman" in a larger font, while the line below it reads "The Tiger Technicians Hour | June 8th, 2022" in a smaller font. The imagery remains consistent throughout the sequence, with the logo and lower-third text remaining static. In the final frame, the "TFNN.COM" logo and "EDUCATING INVESTORS" text disappear from the screen, while the lower-third banner featuring "Basil Chapman" remains visible.
